topic.what: Incentive conditions enabling under-collateralized credit in non-custodial decentralized micropayments
topic.how: Repeated-game model with public monitoring, PPE analysis, bounded exposure, and verifiable settlement outcomes
topic.why_matters: Enables capital-efficient micropayment systems where credit limits scale beyond full collateral backing, addressing liquidity lock-in in existing non-custodial designs

characteristics.what_it_measures: Ratio of credit extended to collateral posted
characteristics.evidence: Section V analysis shows credit expansion without full collateral via continuation value
characteristics.context: Requires bounded exposure vmax and sufficient discount factor δ≥δ*

characteristics.what_it_measures: Time from transaction to final settlement
characteristics.evidence: Section III defines epoch τepoch=4 hours for settlement granularity
characteristics.context: Settlement occurs atomically at epoch boundaries with Merkle root commitments

characteristics.evidence: Section II-d describes finite punishment duration followed by rate-limited trust regeneration
characteristics.context: Part of finite-state control process for incentive enforcement

characteristics.what_it_measures: Degree to which incentive mechanisms enforce conforming behavior
characteristics.evidence: Theorem 1 and Corollary 1 prove aconf>alate>adef for merchants; Proposition 3 for buyers
characteristics.context: Holds under late-penalty condition P_LM>Ψ and bounded liability

characteristics.evidence: Section II-a: transactions aggregated into Merkle tree with single root committed on-chain
characteristics.context: Reduces on-chain workload via batch processing

characteristics.what_it_measures: Minimum discount factor for equilibrium existence
characteristics.context: Depends on bounded exposure vmax and collateral SB_i

requires: verifiable public signals yt for settlement

novelty: Complete characterization of incentive conditions for under-collateralized credit beyond full collateralization
Trade-off analysis: improving capital efficiency vs enforcement conditions for bounded strategic default
Regime identification: under-collateralized credit can be sustained without custodial control under specific assumptions
open_problems: Physical-world oracle and signal generation for delivery verification not analyzed
Unverified buyer self-reporting outside framework scope
Low-discount-factor buyer populations may not sustain equilibrium
Dispute resolution layer design not characterized
